title: TheLounge Official Modpack
description:
The ultimate experience for TheLounge server. An experience more integrated with it's custom equipment and bosses alike.

Play now even on vanilla at: play.theloungemc.com
body:
![Lounge Blue Divider](https://files.catbox.moe/sx3mkn.png) ![Join now!](https://files.catbox.moe/13gmnx.png) ![Lounge Blue Divider](https://files.catbox.moe/sx3mkn.png)
### About

A carefully selected list of mods for TheLounge, made to give you the best experience on the server. Giving you a massive performance boost, much quality of life and features like voice chat and hotkeys for backpacks!

![Lounge Blue Divider](https://files.catbox.moe/sx3mkn.png)
### Socials

![Lounge Blue Divider](https://files.catbox.moe/sx3mkn.png)
